title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password via Settings > Security. They will receive a confirmation email.

title: Refund Policy
content: Customers can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase if the item is unused.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can delete their account from Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is irreversible.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Enable two-factor authentication in Settings > Security to improve account safety.

title: Contact Support
content: For technical issues, users can contact support via support@example.com or by calling 1800-123-456.
